title: Improver Fitting v1 (skills-only): two-phase loop — deterministic maintenance + one capped evidence-cited PTY model pass proposing body-append-only skill edits; snapshot-before-apply + byte-identical rollback; provenance/pinning gates; reuse of the autonomy machine + never-clobber apply + review queue

tests.cmd: npx vitest run tests/improver-skill-telemetry.test.ts tests/improver-maintenance.test.ts tests/improver-skill-gates.test.ts tests/improver-snapshot.test.ts tests/improver-skill-proposal.test.ts tests/improver-pty-path.test.ts tests/improver-v1-cli.test.ts tests/improver.test.ts
tests.summary: 44 passed across 8 files — telemetry parse+scan (Skill tool_use, sessionIds, adjacent is_error); provenance gate (owned/loose/pinned, lock path granularity dir-or-/-prefix, fail-safe empty); maintenance deterministic (stale/archive by age, ineligible skipped, no double-transition) + archive reversibility round-trip; skill gates (body-append passes, frontmatter-rewrite/over-size/empty rejected) + gate-blocks-apply-under-auto; snapshot + byte-identical rollback; skill-proposal cap+dedupe+fabricated-sessionId-drop+not-eligible-drop+no-eligible-no-call; pty-path no banned tokens + dynamic import + tracked under fittings/; AND the hermetic CLI acceptance asserting FINDING 1..6 + IMPROVER-V1 OK last. MR5a/MR5b memory+autonomy suite (tests/improver.test.ts, 11) not regressed.

acceptance.cmd: IMPROVER_PROJECTS_DIR=<fixtures> GARRISON_CLAUDE_HOME=<sandbox> IMPROVER_LOCK=<lock> IMPROVER_PINNED=pinned-helper IMPROVER_MODEL_FIXTURE=<reply> IMPROVER_DATA=<tmp> IMPROVER_NOW=2026-06-17T12:00:00Z node scripts/improver.mjs run-now
acceptance.summary: Hermetic single run prints all six FINDINGs + IMPROVER-V1 OK: F1 evaluated=2 transitioned=1; F2 pinned-helper untouched; F3 proposal block citing real sessionId 1111…1111 (evidence.sessionId in telemetry=true); F4 snapshot path + rollback matches=true (byte-identical); F5 GATE FAIL -> not applied under simulated autonomy=auto; F6 invocation path @garrison/claude-pty#oneShotTurn. Mutates only the tmp sandbox.

purge.summary: PTY-everywhere holds — no @anthropic-ai / --print / stream-json / api.anthropic.com in the new improver .mjs modules (the skills model pass uses @garrison/claude-pty#oneShotTurn via dynamic import). Fixed a pre-existing comment false-positive in knowledge.mjs (--print-config) that was tripping the guard.

validateFitting.summary: PASS — additive config_schema keys (stale_days/archive_days/max_proposals/skill_size_limit/model) + updated summary/for_consumers keep all four checks green.

build.summary: Next build compiled (pending CI confirmation in-session)

e2e.summary: N/A — backend runner + CLI; the hermetic acceptance run + committed vitest gate are the proof. The own-port review-queue UI + LIVE hosted-API apply for skill-suggest proposals shares the deferred review-queue integration from MR5a (see blocker).

by: N/A — backend runner; review-queue UI deferred

video.note: Backend slice — evidence is the hermetic CLI run + committed tests.

blockers: LIVE apply of a skill-suggest proposal through the own-port review UI (Approve → POST /api/quarters file.update on skills/<name>/SKILL.md via the never-clobber baselineSha→409 contract → live reconcile('post-authoring')) shares the deferred review-queue UI integration from MR5a/MR5b. The apply CONTRACT is fully exercised here against a real SKILL.md in the sandbox (planApply/applyWithRetry from apply-core, plus snapshot+gates+rollback); only the live Next round-trip + the recording→real reconcileFn swap remain. Deliberate scope line, not a gap.
notes: Extends the existing memory-consolidation Improver (per brief §5.3 propose-the-minimal-resolution; the fitting always planned skills as the next rule). New rule `skill-suggest` slots into the unchanged autonomy state machine. Phase 1: deterministic, bounded telemetry scan (skill-telemetry.mjs, mirrors claude-logs caps) → provenance classify (provenance.mjs, lock=owned, pinned.json/IMPROVER_PINNED=frozen, fail-safe empty) → maintenance plan (maintenance-core.mjs pure; archive.mjs reversible move). Phase 2: ONE capped @garrison/claude-pty#oneShotTurn pass (skill-proposal.mjs; NOT WarmPtySessionPool — documented; oneShotTurn disposes its session), tolerant JSON parse, cap by slice+dedupe, every cited sessionId validated against telemetry (hallucinated citations dropped). v1 edits are body-append-only (gates.mjs enforces frontmatter byte-identical); snapshot.mjs gives byte-identical rollback; gates run even under autonomy=auto. Hermetic acceptance is fully deterministic via env seams (IMPROVER_PROJECTS_DIR fixtures, GARRISON_CLAUDE_HOME sandbox, IMPROVER_LOCK fixture, IMPROVER_MODEL_FIXTURE recorded reply, IMPROVER_NOW pinned). RETRY 1: header comments in skill-proposal.mjs literally contained the banned tokens (@anthropic-ai//--print/stream-json) and tripped the purge guard — reworded; also fixed a pre-existing knowledge.mjs comment false-positive. Out of scope (state back if drift): memory beyond the existing rule, automations, router-config, garrison config, genetic/DSPy search, online in-agent editing, a new scheduler (reuses fittings/seed/scheduler).
